column2: I’m Ynez Dias, a graduate Computer Science student with a strong interest in building scalable, user-centric applications. I enjoy combining problem-solving, software engineering, and data-driven approaches to create impactful tech solutions.
I Swayam, I chill 👍

Hi, I’m Pravin! 👋 I’m currently pursuing my PhD in Organic Chemistry at New YorkU. I’m a total extrovert who loves a social home and hosting the occasional party, but I’m also very committed to keeping our shared spaces clean and organized. Looking for a roommate who enjoys a fun atmosphere and values a tidy apartment!
Jason Dsilva

Hi, I'm Kashvi Currently Pursuing Bachelor's in Computer Engineering .I'm an open minded girl and enjoy hosting parties and love going out on weekends.

Hi, I'm Ashley I live in California and planning to shift to Boston for my master's at Northeastern University .I'm an introvert and prefer reading books all the time.I love listening to music ocassionally.

1. Max V.  The High-Performance Roomie. I’m here for one thing: efficiency. I don’t mess around with "checking the email" for weeks; if the dishes are in the sink, I box immediately. I spend my weekends on my sim rig, so if you hear me yelling at a virtual turn 4 at 2 AM, just know I’m "simply lovely" once the race is over.
I'm Ryan an outgoing guy new to USA .I recently graduated and I'm for Italy I'd love to connect with open minded people .

Lewis Hamilton. The Style Icon. Looking for a space with good lighting and even better vibes. I’m a bit of a "black cat" personality—I keep to my room to focus on my creative projects and my dog, but I’ll show up to the kitchen in a fit that looks like I’m walking the paddock. I value a peaceful, "still we rise" atmosphere.
heyyy I'm Xiaomi Xui I'm from China.I lovee going on morning walks and working out on daily basis.
Astrea Colaco

Charles L.  The Emotional Architect. I’m incredibly loyal but prone to the occasional "I am stupid" moment (like forgetting my keys). I’m a musician at heart, so expect some piano melodies in the evening. I’m looking for a roommate who understands that sometimes life is just "pain" and we need a glass of wine to talk about it.

Hi! I’m Yuktha.  I’m a grad student in Engineering Management with a tech background. I’m clean, organized, and respectful of shared spaces. I balance academics, gym time, and social life well, and I’m easygoing and friendly. Looking for a positive, drama-free living environment 😊
Gido Rodrigues
Pablo gavi

Fernando Alonso  I’ve been around the block and I know "the plan." I’m the roommate who knows exactly where to find the cheapest groceries and the best Wi-Fi hacks. I’m very protective of my personal space—all of the time you must leave the space—but I’m a total joker once we’re friends
Valentino rossi
Joe gatto

Daniel R.  The "Golden Retriever" Energy. I’m the personality hire of this apartment. I’m always down for a laugh, a "shoey" (maybe just a beer), and a high-energy kitchen dance-off. I’m a big foodie, a bit of a prankster, and I’ll definitely be the one asking if you "have pubes yet" to break the ice
Ash Ketchum

Sebastian Vettel I’m the one who will notice if the fridge is making a weird noise or if a lightbulb is 1% dimmer than it should be. I’m very eco-conscious (expect a lot of recycling bins) and I will probably try to name our toaster. Honestly, what are we doing here if we aren't being tidy?
Ramesh talkeri
Laura perpon

George Russel. I have a presentation ready for why we should switch to 2-ply toilet paper. I’m a "grafter" who works hard and expects the same from my teammates. I’m very "blimey" when things go wrong, but I’m always the first to offer a professional-grade apology.
Devendra Fadnavis
Chintan Kapoor

Maya, I’m a design student with a minor obsession with house plants (my current count is 12). I love a peaceful home environment that feels like a sanctuary. Most nights you’ll find me sketching with a cup of herbal tea or hunting for vintage decor. I’m very respectful of shared spaces—I believe a clean kitchen is a happy kitchen!"
Lukas Podolski
Nandu Bhide
Robert Lewandowski

Amara, Originally from a big, loud family where food was our love language! I love trying out new recipes—everything from sourdough to spicy curries—and I’m always happy to share. I work a 9-5 in tech, so I’m pretty quiet during the week, but I’m always down for a shared Sunday brunch or a movie night.
Justice Dsouza

Chloe, Deeply introverted but very friendly once the ice is broken. I’m a librarian-in-training, so 'quiet hours' are my natural state. I value privacy and personal space, but I’d love a roommate I can occasionally exchange book recommendations with. I’m a non-smoker, very tidy, and I come with a very chill senior cat named Mochi.
Pavel Nedved
